source_pr.title: executor: add ALTER TABLE COMPACT support
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Wish <breezewish@outlook.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #34749

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

**Parser**:

- Add a new `ALTER TABLE [name] COMPACT TIFLASH REPLICA` syntax.

**Executor**:

- A new executor for executing corresponding SQL statement.

Related TiFlash PR that supports the new RPC endpoint: https://github.com/pingcap/tiflash/pull/4885

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test: Will be included in the TiFlash side
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
  - [x] Kill
  - [x] Kill when there are multiple partitions
  - [x] One TiFlash down
  - [x] No TiFlash is up
  - [x] Multiple partitions
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [x] Contains syntax changes - A new syntax is introduced, see above.
- [x] Contains variable changes
- [x] Contains experimental features
- [x] Changes MySQL compatibility - This statement is not available in MySQL.

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Support ALTER TABLE COMPACT statement
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: executor: add ALTER TABLE COMPACT support.
fix_pattern: executor: add ALTER TABLE COMPACT support
